description: The app crashes or shows an error when the user opens the home page or tries to use the flight search. The search form does not appear and the booking flow is broken.
expectedOutcome: The home page loads and shows the flight search form; users can search for flights and proceed through the booking flow without context-related errors.
hint: Check where context providers are mounted in the app tree.
solution: Wrap the app with BookingProvider so that any component using useBooking() (e.g. SearchForm, SearchResultsPage) runs within BookingProvider. Add the BookingProvider import and wrap <App /> with <BookingProvider> inside AuthProvider.
playwrightTestSnippets: test('home page shows search form when booking context is provided', async ({ page }) => { ... await expect(page.getByTestId('search-form')).toBeVisible(); });
test('search flow reaches results when booking context is provided', async ({ page }) => { ... await expect(page.getByTestId('search-results-page')).toBeVisible(); });
symptom: Search or booking flow crashes with a context error (useBooking must be used within BookingProvider).
